description: Detects C# ASP.NET Controller classes with too many action methods (god controller anti-pattern). Simplified from Rust: flags all class_declaration nodes. Cannot filter by Controller suffix or ApiController attribute, count only public non-NonAction methods, or apply the 8-action threshold. Structural detection only.

flag.message: Class detected -- if this is a Controller with more than 8 public action methods, consider splitting into multiple focused controllers.
